spans.why: Entire file is minimal description with no behavior details
Configuration contains only slug, no runtime or behavior configuration
Description 'Demo skill' and 'This is a test skill.' provides no information about actual behavior, capabilities, or purpose

xconcerns.why: Skill claims to be a demo/test but provides zero information about what it does, how it works, or what operations it performs

retrieve.reason: Primary documentation file; contains only minimal description
Configuration file; contains only slug identifier

gaps.why: No code, implementation, or detailed behavior description present
No runtime configuration, dependencies, or execution details
